faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our financing and insurance services.
faq.q1_1: What types of equipment do you finance?
faq.a1_1: We finance all types of professional equipment: vehicles, construction machinery, medical equipment, IT, industrial machines, professional furniture, etc.
faq.q1_2: What is the minimum financing amount?
faq.a1_2: The minimum financing amount is €3,000. There is no fixed maximum — each application is reviewed individually.
faq.a1_3: For a first application: company registration (KBIS) less than 3 months old, the last 3 annual accounts, director's ID, and the supplier's quote.
faq.a2_1: We offer professional liability, builder's insurance, fleet insurance and multi-risk business insurance, tailored to your sector.
faq.q2_2: Can I combine financing and insurance?
faq.a2_2: Yes, it's our specialty! We can integrate insurance directly into your financing contract to simplify your management.
faq.q2_3: How long does it take to get a quote?
faq.a2_3: We commit to providing a personalised quote within 48 hours of receiving your request.
faq.q3_1: How long does the full process take?
faq.a3_1: From application to fund release, expect an average of 5 to 10 business days for a complete file.
faq.a3_2: No, we offer financing with no deposit. However, a deposit can help reduce your monthly payments.
faq.noAnswerDesc: Our team is available to answer all your questions.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.directorDesc: The publication director is the legal representative of Finassur.
legal.hostingAddress: 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, USA
legal.regulationDesc: Finassur is registered with ORIAS as a Banking Operations and Payment Services Broker (COBSP) and Insurance Broker (COA).
legal.ipDesc: All website content (text, images, logos, graphics) is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior authorisation.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.section1: We only collect data necessary for processing your financing and insurance requests: identification information, contact details, company financial data. This data is collected through our online forms with your explicit consent.
privacy.section2: Your data is used exclusively for: processing your financing or insurance requests, communication regarding your ongoing files, improving our services. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.section3: Your personal data is retained for the duration of the business relationship and 5 years after the end of the contract, in accordance with legal obligations. Prospect data is deleted after 3 years without interaction.
privacy.section4: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port and object to your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at: dpo@finassur.fr
privacy.section5: Our site uses essential cookies for service operation and analytical cookies to improve your experience. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via your browser settings.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.section1: These terms of use govern access to and use of the finassur.fr website. By accessing the site, you accept these terms without reservation.
terms.section2: Finassur offers professional equipment financing and insurance brokerage services. Information presented on the site is provided for informational purposes and does not constitute a contractual offer.
terms.section3: Finassur strives to provide accurate and up-to-date information. However, we cannot guarantee the completeness or accuracy of all information on the site. The financing simulator provides indicative estimates and does not constitute a financing offer.
terms.section4: All site elements (text, images, logos, trademarks) are protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction or representation, in whole or in part, is prohibited without prior written authorisation.
terms.section5: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Paris courts.

process.title: Our 4-step process
process.subtitle: Full support from simulation to equipment delivery, in 48h on average.
process.stepsSubtitle: Four simple steps, no commitment, no application fees.

steps.label: Step 1
steps.title: Simulate in 2 minutes
steps.description: Enter the amount, duration and equipment type. Our calculator instantly returns your estimated monthly payment and total cost.

steps.label: Step 2
steps.title: Submit your file
steps.description: Fill in our 5-step form (company, project, documents). Your files are encrypted and stored securely.

steps.label: Step 3
steps.title: Receive your offers
steps.description: Our advisors review your file and submit it to our network of 30+ banking partners. You receive the best offers tailored to your profile.

steps.label: Step 4
steps.title: Sign and receive funds
steps.description: Legal electronic signature (eIDAS), funds release or equipment delivery. Your advisor stays by your side for follow-up.

guarantees.title: Reply within 48h
guarantees.description: Contractual commitment from our team on response time.

guarantees.title: No commitment
guarantees.description: You remain free to accept or refuse the proposed offer.

guarantees.title: 100% secure
guarantees.description: AES-256 encrypted data, GDPR compliant, hosted in Europe.

guarantees.title: Dedicated advisor
guarantees.description: A single point of contact throughout your file.

faq.q: What is the average processing time?
faq.a: 48h for an initial reply, 5 to 7 business days on average for funds release after signature.
A Kbis (less than 3 months old), your last two annual financial statements, a professional bank account info (RIB) and the manager's ID. Our advisor will indicate the precise documents needed.
No, the review of your file and the introduction to our partners are completely free.

faq.q: Can I cancel during the process?
faq.a: Yes, you can cancel your application at any time before electronic signature, with no fees.

whyLeasing.badge: The right choice for your cash flow
whyLeasing.title: Why choose professional leasing?
whyLeasing.subtitle: Operational lease and financial lease have become the favourite financing solutions for French companies. Here's why.
whyLeasing.advantagesSubtitle: A flexible solution, tax-efficient and with no impact on your borrowing capacity.

advantages.title: Preserve your cash flow
advantages.description: No initial down payment required. Your cash stays available to develop your business, hire or invest elsewhere.

advantages.title: Tax benefits
advantages.description: Monthly payments are 100% deductible from your taxable income, unlike depreciation on a classic purchase.

advantages.title: Recoverable VAT
advantages.description: VAT is spread over the monthly payments, improving your cash flow compared to a purchase where VAT is paid up front.

advantages.title: Easy renewal
advantages.description: At the end of the contract, you can return the equipment, buy it at residual value or renew — you always keep recent equipment.

advantages.title: No impact on debt
advantages.description: With financial lease, the equipment doesn't appear on the balance sheet: you preserve your borrowing capacity for other strategic projects.

advantages.title: Maintenance included
advantages.description: Many contracts include maintenance, insurance and assistance, simplifying your management and smoothing your costs.

whyLeasing.comparisonNote: * Subject to applicable accounting standards (IFRS 16 may require balance sheet recognition).

useCases.title: Commercial vehicles & fleet
useCases.description: Renew your fleet every 3-4 years without burdening your balance sheet.

useCases.title: IT equipment
useCases.description: Avoid rapid obsolescence with short, scalable contracts.

useCases.title: Industrial machinery
useCases.description: Finance expensive production tools while preserving working capital.

useCases.title: Medical equipment
useCases.description: Solutions tailored to healthcare professionals and institutions.

whyLeasing.ctaDescription: Financial lease, operational lease, long-term lease: we'll find the right formula for you.

comparator.title: Compare financing solutions
comparator.subtitle: Find the best solution for your project by comparing professional financing options.
comparator.bestForCreditBail: Ideal for preserving cash flow with purchase option
comparator.bestForLld: Ideal for controlled budget without resale concerns
comparator.faq1Q: What is the difference between leasing and hire purchase?
comparator.faq1A: Leasing is mainly intended for professional equipment with 100% tax-deductible payments. Hire purchase (LOA) offers more flexibility at the end of the contract and is suitable for both individuals and professionals.
comparator.faq2Q: Which financing option preserves my cash flow?
comparator.faq2A: Leasing and hire purchase are the best options as they require no initial deposit and payments are tax-deductible. Your cash flow remains available for strategic investments.
comparator.faq3A: The rates shown are indicative and based on average market conditions. The final rate depends on your profile, duration and amount financed. Contact us for a personalised offer.
comparator.faq4Q: Can I change my solution during the contract?
comparator.faq4A: It is possible to renegotiate or transform your contract according to the terms provided. We support you in finding the best option at every stage of your business life.
